About_&_Key_Points:
About
ABB India Limited is an integrated power equipment manufacturer supplying the complete range of engineering, products, solutions and services in areas of Automation and Power technology.

Synergies with Parent:
[1]
[2]
The company is a subsidiary of ABB Ltd which is a
global leader in electrification and automation
with operations in
100+ countries
. The company receives inputs from its parent company, including access to ABB’s centralized R&D facilities, for which it pays royalties. Additionally, ABB offers management support by appointing delegates to the board of ABB India.
